{{Infobox group
| name = Izyrians
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Izyrians Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Izyrians are a people inhabiting the continent of [[Izyria]], characterized by their pale skin and light hair. Historically, they were organized into tribes that inhabited high mountain ranges, where they survived by hunting [[Kameira]]. While many have integrated into the [[Aurelian Empire]], there is a growing movement among Izyrians to return to ancient traditions and ways of [[life]]. This cultural shift has led to the resurgence of blood-sport in their arenas, which are governed by long-standing customs that even [[the Emperor]] has historically respected. A significant aspect of [[Izyrian]] culture is the presence of gladiators and [[Champions]], many of whom descend from light-haired tribes. The city of [[Axciss]] serves as a major hub, housing the headquarters for the [[Champion’s Guild]] and hosting popular [[arena]] contests. The region is currently experiencing significant instability, marked by chaos, food shortages, and civil unrest, which has left their [[Regent]] missing. This volatility is compounded by political tensions between the local leadership and [[Imperial]] authorities, as well as the influence of various [[Guilds]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Izyrians]] are reverting to old ways and using blood-sport in arenas.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Izyrians]] consider themselves separate from the [[Erinin]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aurelian]] general fought against the [[Izyrians]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala]] infiltrated the [[Izyrians]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Izyrians]] rule the [[Izyrians]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[arena]] seats were filled with grubby [[Izyrians]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c15">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Izyrians]] are a group that could revolt if [[Alagaeus]] is the [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The ancient [[Izyrians]] called [[Loreli]] '[[Sunblood]]' after she pierced the side of [[Urg’naut]] and light spilled out.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
